programme.title: Hellboy

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: A warrior sets off to get his revenge on the evil warlord who attacked his village and murdered his father.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules

programme.title: I, Frankenstein

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Elephant White
programme.desc: An assassin is hired by a businessman to avenge the murder of his daughter by white slave traders in Thailand.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Following a traumatic experience, former Special Forces member Dean Cage (Wesley Snipes) is trying to pick up the pieces of his fractured life. With the help of detective Amy Knight (Jacqueline Obradors), Dean tries to block out the painful wartime memories, including the death of his best friend. Everything goes awry, however, when Dean is mistaken for a rogue CIA agent. He is abducted and given a truth serum, and now he must find an antidote to the debilitating psychotropic drug.

programme.title: Sabotage
programme.desc: Members of an elite DEA task force find themselves being taken down one by one after they rob a drug

programme.title: Sin City: A Dame To Kill For
programme.desc: Some of Sin City's most hard-boiled citizens cross paths with a few of its more reviled inhabitants.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers

programme.title: Unlawful Entry
programme.desc: A burglar holds a knife to Karen's throat while her husband does nothing.

programme.title: Jack And Jill
programme.desc: A comedy centered on fraternal twins. Adam Sandler plays both Jack and twin sister Jill.

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: A cowboy star and a legendary lawman team up to make a movie... and find out it can be murder.

programme.title: The Beast
programme.desc: Spectacular action sequences punctuate an emotionally charged war story that pits Soviet soldiers against Afghan rebels.

programme.title: The Marine 6: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Jake Carter and another former Marine, Luke Trapper, join forces to rescue a kidnapped girl from a gang of international criminals.Continuation of the franchise. (Edited for Television)

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny
programme.desc: A naval lieutenant is court-martialed for seizing command of a minesweeper from a neurotic commander (Humphrey Bogart).

programme.title: Fail Safe
programme.desc: American planes are sent to deliver a nuclear attack on Moscow, but it's a mistake due to an electrical malfunction. Can all-out war be averted?

programme.title: Miss Sadie Thompson
programme.desc: A former prostitute inflames the passions of the Marines and a high-minded missionary at a remote South Pacific outpost.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: A U.S. Army tank crew joins a band of stragglers in a desperate search for water in the war-torn North African desert.

programme.title: Brotherhood Of The Wolf
programme.desc: In 18th-century France, the Chevalier de Fronsac and his Native American friend Mani are sent to the Gevaudan province at the king's behest to investigate the killings of hundreds by a mysterious beast.

programme.title: Drugstore June
programme.desc: After the pharmacy in her town is robbed, a girl takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Two Thousand And None
programme.desc: A man finds himself developing a new perspective on life once he finds out it's almost over. Benjamin Kasparian is a paleontologist of Armenian descent who has just split up with his wife Amanda. While trying to readjust to single life, Benjamin visits the doctor and is informed he's suffering from an unusual brain disease called Talbot's Syndrome, and he's not likely to live longer than five weeks. Benjamin is initially philosophical about his fate and decides to enjoy himself as much as he can in the time he has left - much to the disgust of Amanda, his best friend, his boss, and his new girlfriend, all of whom believe he should be taking the matter more seriously.

programme.title: Brain On Fire
programme.desc: A young, capable professional cannot explain her newly erratic behavior.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: After a plane crash, a toxic virus begins to spread. A couple is quarantined but must fight for survival.

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two crew members wake up on an abandoned spacecraft with no idea who they are, and discover they're not alone.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As human blood becomes more scarce, vampires must search for new ways to satisfy their craving.

programme.title: Warhunt
programme.desc: A commander dispatches a team of soldiers on a rescue mission, but they are confronted by a coven of witches.

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: When a cell phone signal causes apocalyptic chaos, an artist is determined to reunite with his young son.

programme.title: Reawakening
programme.desc: John and Mary have lived in grief for ten years because their child, Clare, disappeared when she was fourteen. When Clare mysteriously returns, John suspects she's not who she claims to be, plunging the couple into a search for the truth.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: Salvation
programme.desc: A foster child bonds with a snake-handling Pentecostal community but uncovers sinister truths. She must choose between reporting pastor's crimes or preserving her newfound support system, risking personal safety for a sense of belonging.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: God of War
programme.desc: A maverick commander and a young general join forces to battle pirates who pillage small villages in 16th-century China. The violent clash of wits and weapons will ultimately decide who rules the land.

programme.title: God of War 2
programme.desc: Benevolent healer Seon-ui discovers a divine medicinal substance called 19. She names it Il-yeo-po and they become friends until Dong Zhuo's soldiers forcibly seize Il-yeo-po.

programme.title: The Villainess
programme.desc: Honed from childhood to be an elite assassin, Sook-hee embarks on a rampage of violence and revenge to finally earn her freedom and escape her past.

programme.title: Shadow
programme.desc: To finally achieve victory over a rival kingdom, a brilliant general devises an intricate plan involving his wife, a look-alike and two kings.

programme.title: Believer
programme.desc: A low-level drug dealer joins forces with an ambitious cop to bring down a psychotic cartel kingpin.

programme.title: Abducted By My Teacher: The Elizabeth Thomas Story
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Thomas was groomed by married teacher Tad Cummins.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The College Admissions Scandal with Gretchen Carlson
programme.desc: The rich and famous abusing their privilege to get their kids into college

programme.title: Dancing With a Murderer
programme.desc: Nora, haunted by a gala-night murder, must face her darkest fears.

programme.title: Taken in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: The true story of 17 year old Anne Sluti.

programme.title: The Grim Sleeper
programme.desc: Starring Dreama Walker, Macy Gray, Ernie Hudson, and Michael O'Neill.

programme.title: Hit And Run
programme.desc: A lawyer is riding high after receiving a Not Guilty verdict for her client, but has to look over her shoulder when a woman she meets in a traffic accident is not all she appears to be.

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: In this thriller, a woman tries to help her sister recall the events of the fatal stabbing of their mother.

programme.title: Let Love Grow
programme.desc: Landscape architect Evie meets her match with new client Ryan, whose daughters are her biggest fan.

programme.title: Love and the Radio Star
programme.desc: Hired to rebrand a radio show, Savannah finds herself falling in love after working with the host.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: When Isla’s art unexpectedly sells to Mark, a second commission sees them falling in love.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of partying in Florida. Her trip turns into a wild saga involving a pimp, an idiot boyfriend, and Tampa's finest strip clubs in this film based on the greatest Twitter story ever told.

programme.title: Traffickers
programme.desc: Tiffany Cooper, disgraced by the military, wanted by the cops and running out of time, stops at nothing to take down a Trafficking Operation and save these young girls. Nothing is what it seems when everyone seems to be against you. Trust No One.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When an angel grants a struggling water girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) three wishes, even her mom (Robin Givens) or coach (Reginald VelJohnson) can't figure out how she became a soccer superstar.

programme.title: Broken Harmony
programme.desc: Recording artist Harmony Brown, listens to every suggestion from her record label including changing her sound, changing her look, and even changing the type of music she sang. Yet, her numbers aren’t improving, and she’s on the verge of being released from her contract. Her manager, suggests she returns to Atlanta and meet with a power house music producer to give her a refresh on her sound. However, she’s forced to stay with and reunite with her mother, and address the trauma of her childhood.

programme.title: For All Have Sinned
programme.desc: After the sudden death of his mother, Mano embarks on a violent path that stems from his grief and causes him to spiral. He lives by the mantra of Romans 3:23 “for all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God.” When a local church members attempts to reach him, he finds a way to navigate his pain and grief.

programme.title: The Bayou City Murders
programme.desc: Houston Police Officer Tamara Haynes takes a bold interest in recent murders of women in Houston’s South Side. However, the case are unique and have horrific similarities and there is likely a serial killer on the loose. Then a local prostitute that Tamara has connections to turns up missing, making this investigation personal. When she meets a man that she starts to fall for, the true nature of those involve becomes unmasked.

programme.title: Buried
programme.desc: After the murder of his fiancée and her lover, Cameron escapes Atlanta under a new identity and loses the trail of the investigators. When he meets Lauren after settling in Florida, his cover begins to crack when a neighbor begins asking questions, and opening secrets that are supposed to be buried.

programme.title: Lot Lizards 2: Revenge Route
programme.desc: Destitute and desperate, China is forced to the edge, taking up work as a truck stop sex worker just to survive. Into this grim reality storms Ze, who has come to town seeking vengeance on Angie's sister—the woman who murdered his brother, Tez. But Ze's plans are bigger than just revenge: he aims to rally and recruit every woman working the highway.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: Oahu’s volcanic disaster becomes a global threat.

programme.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
programme.desc: As Sharknados tear through New York, no vehicle, building, or national monument is safe.

programme.title: Alien Rubicon
programme.desc: A spacecraft lands in New York and heads toward our Capital. If it arrives, it will trigger an invasion.

programme.title: Halloween Night
programme.desc: Based on a true story, a man breaks free from an asylum on Halloween night and slaughters more victims.

programme.title: San Andreas Mega Quake
programme.desc: The "Big One" will sink California into the ocean, and scientists must stop by triggering a volcanic eruption.

programme.title: Evil Eyes
programme.desc: As an author writes a script about a slaughtered family, the murders he's writing happen to people around him.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: The Werewolf Of Washington
programme.desc: Elvira presents the 1973 Horror-Comedy The Werewolf of Washington which acts as a political spoof of The Wolf Man.

programme.title: 13 Nights of Elvira
programme.desc: Elvira is put through the ringer, and hung out to dry, after sitting through this movie. She should have quit while she was a head!

programme.title: 13 Nights of Elvira
programme.desc: Elvira's couch is infested with pesky little critters who are clearly Gremlin rejects. The only way she's gonna get rid of them is to endure this flick.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: The Doomsday Machine
programme.desc: Elvira showcases the 1972 Sci-Fi Disaster film The Doomsday Machine which follows a group on a spaceship who witnessed the earth being destroyed.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: Count Dracula’s Great Love (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Elvira presents Javier Aguirre's classic horror tale following four travelers who are forced to stay at Dracula's castle.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Stacy and Devlin fall in love. Stacy's fiancée, Mitch sets out to kill Devlin. However, Mitch soon gets a nasty surprise when he discovers Devlin's has a supernatural necklace and proves his love to be strong in the face of death.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Insurance agent James kills his client in a plot to take his client's money and his wife. However James' boss shows up to reveal that he knows about the murder, and blackmails James to meet his demands.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Marty plans to run off with all of the money from charity concerts, but his conscience is trying to get through to him. His greedy banker blackmails him for half of the money, while his conscience is trying to get him to do the right thing.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Mary Jo, is forced into labor on the farm of George and Luisa Yates, in exchange for being sheltered from the police. One day, Mary Jo suffers a head injury and believes that a scarecrow is her lover, which the Yates plan to use for their benefit

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Aspiring ventriloquist Billy Goldman wants to improve his craft. To that end, he seeks out his idol, retired ventriloquist Mr. Ingels for advice. Soon after, Billy finds out that his idol has a dark past, as well as a gruesome secret.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A witch posing as a cosmetic salesperson visits the home of young, eccentric couple, Donald and Judy. She convinces Judy to try a magic necklace that allows the two of them to swap bodies, leaving Donald to try and figure out which one is his wife.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy funeral director exploits grieving families by overcharging and reusing coffins. When his orphaned nephew comes to live with him, the boy discovers his uncle's cruelty-until a deadly twist ensures the undertaker gets a chilling, ironic fate.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A comic book artist for Tales From the Crypt finds his gruesome drawings coming to life after his wife meddles with his work. As bizarre murders mirror his art, he's caught between reality and fantasy in a twisted, darkly comedic horror tale.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A two-faced sideshow freak discovers his origins when a greedy carnival owner buys a mysterious Egyptian mummy. Their fates intertwine in a darkly comic twist, revealing a bizarre family connection and a macabre inheritance.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A woman witnesses a brutal murder from her window, but shock leaves her unable to speak. Her husband calls a doctor-who is secretly the killer. Trapped in silence, she must find a way to warn someone before it's too late.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A brash TV host films a live special inside a supposedly haunted house, mocking the supernatural. As eerie events escalate, his skepticism turns to terror when he realizes the spirits are real-and they've been waiting for him.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Conjoined twins Eddie and Frank share everything-except personalities. When a doctor offers to separate them, greed, jealousy, and betrayal surface, leading to a darkly ironic twist where the wrong brother pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A wealthy couple adopts a sickly orphan, promising him a mysterious "secret" when he turns 18. As his health improves, he grows suspicious of their intentions-until a chilling twist reveals a monstrous truth neither expected.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Electrician Niles Talbot has been promoted to executioner. When the death penalty is abolished in his state, Niles loses his job. But he decides to become a vigilante, punishing criminals that are released by justice system.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Elizabeth kills her second husband for his insurance money. Upon getting rid of the body, she is attacked by an escaped mental patient dressed as Santa Claus. She soon fears that her young daughter may be Santa's next victim.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "No Place Like Home" - Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Riders of the Whistling Skull
programme.desc: The Three Mesquiteers appeared in several Republic Pictures during the 1930s, and this is considered one of their best. It's about a mysterious murder at an archeological expedition, which leads the three prairie pals into some dangerous territory. Can they solve the murder without losing their own lives? The cast includes Robert Livingston, Ray Corrigan, Max Terhune, and Roger Williams, all trying to survive a hail of poison arrows and hot lead!

programme.title: Idaho
programme.desc: Western icon Roy Rogers, along with his trusty companion Trigger, are back for another adventure. This time, a respected judge is being framed for murder by a crooked saloon owner. Always the valiant champion, Rogers vows to clear the name of the judge and find the truth all while courting a lovely beau. Cellist turned editor turned Republic Pictures workhorse Joseph Kane takes the reins of this rousing, musical adventure, which features a number of original songs performed by Rogers himself, with the help of singer-songwriter Bob Nolan and character actor Smiley Burnette (TVs Petticoat Junction).

programme.title: Brothers of the West
programme.desc: Tom Tyler plays Tom Wade, a range detective whose brother has been accused of robbery and murder. Wade has only one clue to prove his brothers innocence: a set of unusual tire tracks. This film was directed by Sam Katzman, who later became known as Jungle Sam for his association with a variety of jungle thrillers, and then as a master of all exploitation genres, from teen horror to flying saucer flicks!

programme.title: The Fighting Redhead
programme.desc: When a rustler named Faro kills one of his own henchmen and blames it on Sheila O'Conner, Red and Little Beaver set out to clear Sheila and to find evidence against Faro and his gang.

programme.title: Rawhide Rangers
programme.desc: Blackie's gang is creating havoc and the Ranger, Brand Calhoun and his brother go to investigate.

programme.title: Springtime in the Sierras
programme.desc: Ads for this Roy Rogers classic roared HEAD FOR THE MUSICAL HILLS...ROY IS GUNNIN' FOR THRILLS! And thrills are what you'll get when you watch this fun, action packed B-Western from Republic Pictures. There's some great comic relief from Andy Devine and Chester Conklin, two of Hollywood's all-time greats. This old-fashioned shoot-'em-up was directed by William Witney, who would go on to direct many of television's top western sagas, including Bonanza, Wagon Train, and The Wild, Wild West.

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Roy Rogers goes to jail after hes wrongly accused of killing Gabby Hayes horse in this action packed yarn from Republic Pictures. All of the old jokes about cowboys kissing their horse may have started with this very movie, as it focuses on Roys loving relationship with Trigger, the greatest horse in all of Hollywood. The film also features Roys beloved Dale Evans, plus, adding some country swing to the musical numbers is Roys favorite backing band, the Sons of the Pioneers! Songs include Ole Faithful, Long, Long Ago and Livin Western Style.

programme.title: The Wide West

programme.title: Pinkerton

programme.title: Doc Holliday
programme.desc: Doc Holliday runs a small dental practice in rural Georgia when he is visited by Wyatt Earp and offered a chance to become a United States Deputy. All Doc has to do is capture the Bridle Brothers - two of most notorious outlaws the West has ever seen. The Doc sets out on an adventure like none other to find these hardened criminals and ends up forging a friendship with Wyatt Earp that would carry into the events of Tombstone.

programme.title: Broken Arrow

The battle for poker immortality begins.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In a festive Cookie Swap episode, Clinton Kelly makes Butter Cookies dipped in chocolate, Carla Hall bakes Molasses Lemon Crinkle Cookies, and Michael Symon shares his grandmother's beloved Pinoli Cookies. Between outdoor filming challenges and a lively Chew It or Screw It game, the holiday baking chaos is at its most delicious.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes a beautifully layered Rolled Lasagna packed with ricotta, mozzarella, and a rich meat sauce, turning a holiday classic into an elegant presentation. The hosts explore the emotional side of holiday cooking and the difference between celebration dishes and intimate family comfort food.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Celebrity chef Rocco DiSpirito joins the Chewed Up crew for a very special Christmas Eve episode as Carla Hall prepares elegant Blue Crab Spaghetti. The conversation covers air fryer controversies, Christmas Eve traditions, and the art of making a restaurant-quality seafood pasta at home.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall leads Christmas morning with her beloved Cinnamon Rolls featuring a cream cheese frosting brightened with orange zest, sharing her make-ahead technique that lets the rolls be prepared days in advance and baked fresh on Christmas morning. The hosts discuss holiday baking rituals and the joy of waking up to something already prepared.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The Chewed Up crew rings in New Year's Eve week with a cocktail-forward episode featuring Clinton Kelly mixing festive vodka-based drinks while the hosts reflect on the year ending and new beginnings ahead. Sparkles makes her return, adding her signature energy to the holiday finale.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon celebrates New Year's Eve by sharing his Eastern European family tradition of eating pork and sauerkraut for good luck, making a simple and deeply satisfying Pork and Sauerkraut Stew with pork shoulder, smoked paprika, and beer. The hosts stay in low-key holiday mode, swapping stories about card games, New Year's traditions, and the comfort of staying home.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall rings in the New Year by cooking Black-Eyed Pea Stew with collard greens and rice, a Southern tradition she considers essential for bringing luck, health, and prosperity into the new year. Special guest Deb Riegel, an executive coach and fifth-generation New Yorker, joins to discuss the difference between New Year's resolutions and intentions.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Renowned chef Charlie Palmer joins Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon for a fascinating conversation about American cuisine and farm-to-table sourcing, while demonstrating his elegant Paccheri with Koginut Squash PurÈe and Stracciatella. Palmer shares the origin story of his annual Pigs and Pinot event and his philosophy of building relationships with farmers to source specialty ingredients.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon transforms a Fan Fridge full of leftover ingredients into an impressive Charred Cabbage with Bacon-Yogurt Avocado Sauce and Miso Brown Butter Vinaigrette, proving that humble cabbage deserves far more respect. The hosts discuss miso's surprising versatility, recall beloved childhood restaurants, and debate Eddie Murphy's comedy legacy.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly earns his Gay Soup Diet credentials by making a hearty Chickpea and Ditalini Pasta Soup that he insists is both deeply comforting and genuinely slimming for January. Michael Symon and Carla Hall join in for a lively episode about winter blues, childhood thermostat disputes, and the surprisingly emotional power of a good bowl of soup.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon elevates the humble chicken tender by using a feta brine to infuse the meat with tangy, salty flavor before breading and shallow-frying to golden perfection. He finishes the dish with a bold hot honey sauce made with Calabrian chili, creating an indulgent yet sophisticated take on a crowd-pleasing classic.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Crispy Pork Belly" - Inspired by something he saw on TikTok, Chris faces his fears and begins working on a dish hes never successfully gotten right: crispy, Cantonese-style roast pork belly.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave wasn't happy with the results of his last salsa-seca-coated schnitzel and deigns to learn from his mistakes. This time, Dave takes schnitzel inspired by a Los Angeles restaurant and makes it even more Los Angeles by making it gluten-free. He also makes a delicious lemon puree as a pairing, as well as crispy cabbage like one might see with a tonkatsu. And, of course, Dave makes a bulldog sauce as well. Let's see if this version is more up to Dave's standards to be served to upcoming guest Mina Kimes.

programme.title: What To Cook Next
programme.desc: Crisp, golden, and deeply satisfying. Nico breaks down the art of frying with pork and shrimp lumpia, finished with a house-made sweet chili sauce.

programme.title: What To Cook Next
programme.desc: Filipino breakfast staples, explained. Nico cooks tortang talong, longsilog, and garlic rice — comfort food that anchors the day with savory, soulful flavors.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: Romance is in the air at Recipe Club! Host Chris Ying is joined by David Chang, Nico de Leon, and Becky Joiner, who all compete with recipes to love on Valentine’s Day. Dave makes a chocolate soufflé, Nico woos with an osso buco, and Becky brings the pasta sauce she makes with her husband for V-Day. Which dish will win our hearts?

programme.title: What To Cook Next

programme.title: Recipe Club

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: The gang’s all here! It’s a Recipe Club Potluck and we’ve invited some friends. Our friend Mandy Roberts brought buffalo dip sliders, Justin Pichetrungsi of Anajak Thai brought buldak fried chicken, and Zach Brooks of Smorgasburg LA brought jambalaya. A delicious time with friends sounds right up our alley here at Recipe Club. But even in friendly competition, whose dish was best?

programme.title: Recipe Club

programme.desc: On Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet life and food of its local farmers, in contrast to the reputation as a dazzling party island. In the kitchen, she makes a garlicky local pasta recipe, and a traditional Greek island fish soup.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas

Diane visits a fish market where the catch is right off the boat, sails the coast, and returns to her kitchen to create three delicious, contemporary Greek recipes, inspired by the cosmopolitan bustle and fun-loving spirit of the Athenian coast.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane and friend and ultramarathoner, Dean Karnazes, meet up for a run. He helps Diane hone her technique, sharing healthy eating tips. Together they make a simple Greek salad with local ingredients and enjoy perfect Mediterranean living. Back in her kitchen, Diane cooks up a very healthy plant-forward Messinian meal, with lots of olive oil, beans and greens.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Naxos is famed for the quality of its meats, its array of cow's milk and sheep-and-goats' milk cheeses and for its potatoes. Diane heads from the shore straight to a remote mountain hideaway with Alexis in tow, where two local cooks await them with a feast of stuffed lamb, potatoes, and a unique skillet pumpkin-onion pie.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Set sail with Chef Walter Staib on a two-part adventure down the majestic Danube River! Part 1 charts a course through Germany and Austria, exploring stunning valleys amidst Europe's heart. Discover historic sites, artistic treasures, and culinary delights at every stop along this unforgettable journey.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Our journey continues through Austria, Slovakia, and ending in the Hungarian city of Budapest. We’ll marvel at architectural wonders and savor the flavors of the region with Chef Walter Staib as he prepares traditional meals aboard a luxurious cruise ship. Don't miss this unforgettable finale on the mighty Danube!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Journey to St. John's, Newfoundland, to discover the deep connection locals have with nature's bounty, and meet inspiring individuals who fish, farm, and cook with generations of tradition. Savor unique recipes prepared over crackling fire-pits, including the king of St. John's cuisine: cod.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Join Chef Walter Staib on a journey to Colorado Springs, where we'll explore the history of this scenic landscape, from the indigenous Ute people through the era of homesteaders. At the Historic Rock Ledge Ranch, savor delicious recipes that have withstood the test of time. Don't miss out on this opportunity to experience the flavors and heritage of Colorado Springs!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib visits Curacao to unravel the delicious stories behind this vibrant Caribbean island. We'll meet local chefs who share their culinary passion through mouthwatering dishes like stewed papaya, okra soup, and stuffed Dutch cheese. Unforgettable flavors and island adventures await as we explore Curacao's heritage and unique cuisine, making this an episode you won’t want to miss!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib dives into the coastal bounty of Port Aransas, Texas! Discover legendary fishing tales, explore the vibrant local culture, and savor unique seafood creations with Chef Pete Mims. Experience how Texas spices meet Gulf Coast flavors in a culinary adventure that blends tradition and innovation. Join us for an unforgettable journey through the rich, diverse tastes of coastal Texas.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Saddle up for Southern charm as Chef Walter Staib rides through Nashville's history at Belle Meade Mansion. Explore the melodic roots of Country Music, visit iconic landmarks, and whip up delicious Southern eats like Country ham, fruitcake, and syllabub. Experience Nashville’s rich cultural heritage and culinary delights in this captivating journey.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Unveil Charleston's soul as we explore the layers of its history at the International African American Museum and a Lowcountry rice farm. Learn crabbing secrets from a local pro, then cook with a passionate chef, celebrating Southern staples of the local cuisine.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie takes Beth -- a mom, a full-time labor and delivery nurse, and a grad student -- under her wing. Ellie helps Beth rein in her takeout habit with three easy make-ahead recipes that stock her fridge with a week of tasty meals. Recipes include Blueberry-Chia Overnight Oats, Turkey-stuffed Pizza Pockets, Cajun Shrimp in Foil, and Red Wine Salad Dressing.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: The key to having chocolate in your life in a manageable way is to go for quality over quantity. In this episode, we visit the Chocolate Expo and Ellie demonstrates how to incorporate the joys of chocolate into everyday menus, clarifying how to take advantage of its health benefits. Recipes include Fig & Ginger Truffles, Double-Chocolate Waffles a la Mode, Mocha Java Smoothie, and more.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The O'Kane family's patience is truly tested during a complete to-the-studs kitchen renovation. Homeowner Yvonne starts to get impatient to feed her family home cooked dinners. Added pressure: another fireplace to deal with, uneven floors, custom cabinets and an uncovered secret staircase. (All that plus a new puppy.) Thanks to Mar's 6 design principles this custom space is unique and stunning.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: It's 'Lost in Space' because somehow these home makeover clips never made it to Mar's! Bloopers Alert! Unseen Tips Alert! Inspired by viewer feedback, an entire show that includes highlights of the greatest gaffs, goofs and guffaws. Plus, some renovation and makeover projects never before aired.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar Jennings uses his 6 Casual Luxury design principles to transform a typical master bedroom, closets and bath into a boutique, hotel-style oasis. The O'Kanes are desperate to stop sleeping on their couches and get back into their master bedroom - but with a new cathedral ceiling installation, private deck installation, custom vanities, several setbacks and delays this renovation won't be easy.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Not only does Mar Jennings have the task of pleasing the adult O'Kanes, but he has to satisfy Teddy, a young man between childhood and young adulthood. AND try to make space in an already-small bedroom. Can it even be done? All while juggling two desk and office spaces-for Teddy and his parents. Mar's unexpected solutions for this kids bedroom and office makeover are truly Casual Luxury.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: More things that regular episodes just couldn't fit in, so we say they didn't quite make it to Mar's! Filled with some of Mar's favorite people and places that viewers wanted to see more of, and of course some delightfully hilarious bloopers, too. Plus, more renovation, makeover and design sMARt tips (like fixing uneven floors) and great locations. As always, Casual Luxury has no boundaries.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar is tasked with carving out two new basement rooms from storage space: a studio and laundry room. With Mar's 6 design principles, he must make dark and dank become bright and stunning. The homeowners expect to be wowed by these 'creative' and 'clean' space makeovers, but with pipes and beams in the way and unexpected challenges, this project might just push Mar over the edge.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Homeowners Neil & Yvonne challenge Mar to makeover a pool area-adjacent media room and make it all-season functional for entertaining. Mar uses his 6 exclusive Casual Luxury design principles to completely re-think the area, including reclaiming basement space to add a bonus kitchenette & full bath. Walls and a fireplace must go! Will the family be ready to entertain-and will they love the reveal?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Witness the renovation evolution of some truly reMARkable outdoor living spaces: new pergola, new pool deck and new sun deck. (You won't believe the magical makeover transformation of the garage roof!) And Mar gets a visit from a TV friend, who he sneaks in for peek at the progress before the family gets their final look at the space.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Can Mar handle a surprise project? You bet. Follow this unplanned-for renovation and design overhaul of the main floor family room and living room. Mar's hope for the reveal? That the O'Kane family will love the relaxed feeling of the family room and how he's upping the glamour quotient of the living room. Meanwhile, a secret time capsule sheds light on the home's history.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Watch as the landscape makeover design takes shape, going from overgrown and out of place to perfectly balanced, for the ultimate Casual Luxury curb appeal. Sometimes, the design process hurts. Mar needs the homeowner, Yvonne, to put nostalgic connections aside in order to handle the extensive renovations required.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Time to gut and renovate two out-of-date and well-used kids' bathrooms! As payback for being displaced, the 3 kids 'treat' Mar to the Trapeze School of New York-he responds with a trip to Six Flags new England. (Cue the screaming.) Meanwhile, the transformational Casual Luxury bathroom makeovers are taking shape. After only a few surprises and challenges, this reveal is the kids' favorite one yet.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier

programme.title: The Ballad of Cable Hogue
programme.desc: After he is abandoned in the desert without water, Cable Hogue (Jason Robards) wanders for days until he finds a supply of water in a muddy ditch. Determining that the spot is the only spring in the area, Cable decides to start a business offering water to passing stagecoaches. Aided by his new friend, Joshua (David Warner), and a prostitute named Hildy (Stella Stevens), Cable builds a successful business. However, when motorcars start to pass, Cable realizes his trade is down to its last days.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West
programme.desc: There's a single piece of land around Flagstone with water on it, and rail baron Morton (Gabriele Ferzetti) aims to have it, knowing the new railroad will have to stop there. He sends his henchman Frank (Henry Fonda) to scare the land's owner, McBain (Frank Wolff), but Frank kills him instead and pins it on a known bandit, Cheyenne (Jason Robards). Meanwhile, a mysterious gunslinger with a score to settle (Charles Bronson) and McBain's new wife, Jill (Claudia Cardinale), arrive in town.

programme.title: Steve's Street Sweeper - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Steve the Street Sweeper is cleaning the street when garbage splatters all over the side of his truck! He doesn't want a dirty truck, so Steve races to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Steve's vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Steve leaves one happy customer, and is ready to get back to sweeping rubbish.

programme.title: Down By The Bay - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see cat wearing a hat? How about a goat rowing a boat? Well you can in this video for the classic children’s song, Down By The Bay!

programme.title: Mr. Pig & Mr. Mouse Have A Mess On Their Hands - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig love making food and having their friends over to eat it. But afterwards, their house is a complete mess! It's so gross, they don't even want to drive their van home to clean up. How can Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig share their love of food with their friends without cluttering their home? Mr. Monkey has a tasty idea! What is it? Watch and find out!

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Driving In My Car - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Drive a car, ride a bike, row a boat, ride on a train, and fly an airplane with this playful and super fun song for kids; “Driving In My Car”! Driving in my car. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very fast. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very slow. Vroom vroom vroom. I like driving. Driving in my car.

programme.title: See You Later Alligator - Super Simple Puppets - Kids Songs - Super Simple
programme.desc: It’s time to go! Here’s a video featuring the Super Simple Puppets for our popular goodbye song, See You Later, Alligator. This is a fun song to sing at the end of a class, party, or play-date!

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Over The Deep Blue Sea - Puppets - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Yo-ho-ho! Review different types of weather while climbing aboard a pirate ship with the Super Simple Puppets! We’re going this way, that way. Forwards, backwards. Up and down, up and down. Over the deep blue sea.

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Five Little Chicks - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Five Little Chicks is great for nap time and for practicing counting down from five. Try singing along when it’s time for a nap.

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Let's Go For A Drive! - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Get in on the fun and join Milo in his pretend car for a quick ride. Do you see the ducks crossing the road? How about people walking on the sidewalk? Wait, don't cross on a red light!

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a fireman’s hat to Stefan in Germany. His dad is a fireman and is coming to school to tell everyone about his job. But a fire breaks out and the fire truck runs out of water. Donnie uses a fountain as a giant shower head, attaching it to a hose and tapping into underground springs to bring enough water to save the day.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Meena is going to perform a Bollywood dance with her friends. Jett brings the costumes, but there is a mistake and they are all white instead of many colors. The kids dye the outfits but while they are drying the wind blows them away. Jerome arrives to help Jett gather up the costumes and get them back in time for the performance.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Peru and lands at a small airport where Pilar and her friends greet him. He gives them pins for their Fantastic Flyers Club. They want Jett to take them on an airplane ride but he is not a passenger plane. Jimbo sends Big Wing, who takes them on their very first trip into the sky!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Bolivia and brings a miner’s helmet to Angelo. His dog has run away. They go with his grandpa to the mine where they take a wild ride on a mining cart, which breaks while underground. Donnie arrives and drills his way through the stone surface to save them.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes a bicycle to Nadia in Bangladesh, who lives on a houseboat with her Mom. Jett teaches her how to ride. When she wants to ride home they run into rain and the road is flooded. Donnie comes and adapts the bike to ride on water. When Nadia arrives home the houseboat is going down the river and the Super Wings must bring it back.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett arrives in rainy London and brings a teddy bear to Cecily. They give the bear an umbrella and take him out to play. The wind lifts the bear away and he flies over the city and falls into a crowd of people with umbrellas. Jerome comes to lead the crowd in a dance number that ends with the bear being revealed and reunited with Cecily.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes a guitar to Shanna in Jamaica, who plays in her family reggae band. They are invited to perform on a ship but miss the boat. Mira comes and transforms a barge into a cool floating stage.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett arrive with a “magic lamp” for Asya in Turkey. She wants a genie to grant her wishes but the lamp does not work, so Jett offers to become her genie. Dizzy comes and helps to fly a magic carpet to Cappadocia where Asya brings ice cream to her Dad who is riding in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dema have to find a yeti, but there's a panda cub in danger. How will they save him?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Yaari drives Tippy across the sea, but Tippy gets stuck between two icebergs. How will Jett and his super wing friends save the day?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Mayta and Jett are ready to draw something big in the ground, but it takes forever. What will Jett and Mayta do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Tae-Hun's project is finished for the science festival, but Seo-Yoon's robot goes out of control. What will Jett, Tae-Hun, and Seo-Yoon do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Kian wants to be a giant, but Aiden knocks over Grand Albert's invention, that makes Aiden become a giant. What will Jett, Donnie, Grand Albert, and Kian do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A dinosaur skeleton is finished to be put in a museum, but a dinosaur skeleton goes after the tow-truck with a magnet. What will Jett, Donnie, Paul, and Justin do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Grand Albert, and Margot go back in time to see a real mammoth, but a mother mammoth thinks they are bad guys, until a mother mammoth gets stuck in the hole in the ice. What will Jett, Grand Albert, Margot, and Erk do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Archie and Jett have to find a toy alligator. How will Jett and Archie get it back?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jules and his grandmother are making a giant waffle, but Jett accidentally adds too much yeast. Can Donnie stop the disaster?

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Kids TV Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Nursery rhymes, baby videos and kids songs that your kindergartener can sing and dance to all day long! Enjoy this first of many hour-long collections of Kids TV's most popular hit animations. Kids TV introduces your toddlers to a variety of classic nursery rhymes as well as original kids songs for a wholesome and fun way to learn the basics of life. See you inside!

programme.title: Car & Trucks Songs - Zeek And Friends
programme.desc: Join Zeek and friends in a musical adventure across the car cartoon city. Sing nursery rhymes, read wonderful stories and play cool games with your favorite cartoon heroes. Children learn valuable lessons while singing and dancing to the most popular rhymes like Old Mac Donald, Finger family, rig a jig jig, five little monkeys, Jingle bells and so many more!

programme.title: Wash Your Hands + More Kids Songs and Nursery Rhymes by Boom Buddies
programme.desc: Join your favorite nursery rhymes characters, Super Supremes on their fun adventures of learning. Learn to wash your hands and sing along with this healthy habits song and more popular baby songs like Soccer Song, Bath Time Song, Swimming Song, Yes Yes Song, Boo Boo Song, Please and Thank You, Zoo Song, Growing Up Song, Finger Family, Three Little Kittens and many more kids rhymes.

programme.title: Cartoon Cars & Trucks Formation
programme.desc: Join street vehicles like monster trucks, garbage truck, fire truck, ambulance, dump trucks, diggers, police car, school bus, taxi and more in their funny action & adventure episodes for kids . In this funny educational transportation cartoon toddlers and babies will learn colors and how to build various car cartoons while having lots of fun!

programme.title: Super Supremes Dinosaur Song & More Kids Songs
programme.desc: The kids are so excited to learn about dinosaurs. Here is a collection of our best videos.

programme.title: Baby Shark & More Nursery Rhymes - Super Supremes
programme.desc: Let's explore the ocean with Baby Shark! Enjoy popular easy to learn nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers. Super supremes is a kids tv show where you can learn more baby songs like swimming song, bath song, five little babies, finger family, twinkle twinkle little star, johny johny yes papa, peek a boo, this is the way, daddy's red car, the muffin man, wheels on the bus and kids songs.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple isn't paying attention when Strawberry describes their campout tradition of telling "Tall Tales." So Apple tells her thrilling adventure of a wild road rally she entered, only to surprise the girls by proving the story is actually true.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City. When Strawberry's stuffed-up nose makes her bake a bad-tasting cake, Apple, afraid the truth will hurt Strawberry's reputation, proclaims it's delicious. The fib snowballs when the Queen of Berryvania reads Apple's review and orders Strawberry's new cake for her ball.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykin Bloom's braggart cousin, Berrykin Bertram, has won the hot sauce competition at the local county fair year after year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Apple feels left out of a Berryball game and an advanced ballet class, she invents some "groove booties" programmed to dance to any beat. She temporarily impresses her friends with her dance moves, but when the groove booties go out of control and threaten the town's Berryball game, she is forced to fess up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the girls discover that Apple's groove booties can teach the pups to dance, Plum gets an idea for a Doggie Dance Show. Wanting to impress them, Huck offers to have TomTom join the show... despite the pup's obvious dislike of performing in public. It's up to Strawberry to help Huck see that he should not force TomTom into something he just doesn't want to do.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry and Orange are dangling their legs in the stream when something tickles Orange's foot. She is sent squealing from the water, certain an eel is after her. Strawberry good-naturedly chuckles at her antics. But Orange gets her dander up and wades into the water to face her "attacker." When she looks down into the water, gazing up at her is the cutest, most adorable, puffy-cheeked fish she's ever seen. It's love at first sight. Orange has to take him home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: At the next Storytime, Strawberry is going to read a new poem. We see her at the podium as she finishes writing it, one afternoon when no one else is in the café except Custard and Pupcake. Strawberry clears her throat and reads the poem aloud. It's a simple, sweet rhyme about the magic of making wishes on falling stars. She tries a few different rhymes as she goes, noting them on her paper. She is startled to hear applause from Mr. Longface Caterpillar who has heard her recital.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: From the BerryWorks to Strawberry's Café, everyone is excited about who will win this year's Spring Flower Festival! Berry Bitty City is decorated with colorful banners proclaiming the big event. Lemon works the hardest. For weeks she has watered her violets by day and sung to them at night, doing everything she can to win first prize. With the contest just a day away, Lemon is at her garden early.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's friends watch her with wide eyes as she everrrrr-so-gently squirts a layer of blueberry smoothie into a tall glass, trying to not disturb the five other multi-colored layers beneath it. It's her tenth attempt to create the world's first Rainbow Smoothie! She has even painted one wall of her café rainbow colors in honor of the soon-to-be new item on the menu. No one dares breathe for fear of spoiling the delicate touch of a master smoothie-squirter at work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug. The poor ladybug is stressed out because her twin cousins, Kadiebug and Sadiebug, left her a message that they are coming to visit for a whole week. Jadey is unable to host them because she's having her guest room repainted.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.
